source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/90_규격 Test report/1. 시험소 제출서류/11. 부품인증서_사양서/기구물/카본/물성표/1. MSDS.pdf

document.title: 물질안전보건자료 (MATERIAL SAFETY DATA SHEET): 탄소섬유 프리프레그, F07 (F07F) 수지시스템
document.revisionOrVersion: Document No. TAKPP MSDS-018; Version 1.0; 개정횟수 1회

sourceSummary.oneLine: MSDS for Toray Advanced Materials carbon fiber prepreg F07 (F07F) resin system, revised 2021-10-01.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides hazard classification, handling, exposure protection, transport, disposal, and Korean regulatory information for the product.
keyPoints: Hazard classifications include skin irritation category 2, eye irritation category 2, skin sensitization category 1, and chronic aquatic hazard category 2.
Supplier is 도레이첨단소재 주식회사 with emergency telephone +82-2-3279-1067.
Composition includes carbon fiber CAS 7440-44-0 at 50-80% and 2,2-bis(4’-glycidyloxyphenyl) propane CAS 1675-54-3 at 5-15%.
Transport section states the material is not classified as dangerous under IATA, IMDG, or ADR regulations.
Regulatory section states Chemical Substances Control Act reporting applies for 2,2-bis(4’-glycidyloxyphenyl) propane when contained at 1% or more.

entities.name: 한국산업안전보건공단
entities.evidence: 한국산업안전보건공단 인증을 받은 방독마스크를 착용할 것.

entities.name: 고용노동부
entities.evidence: 고용노동부 고시 제 2016-19호 (물질안전보건자료의 비치 등에 관한 기준)

entities.name: 환경부
entities.evidence: 누출량이 많은 경우 119나 환경부, 지방환경관리청, 시·도(환경지도과)에 신고하시오.

concepts.name: NFPA hazard rating
concepts.evidence: 유해·위험성 분류기준에 포함되지 않는 기타 유해·위험성 (NFPA) 보건 = 2, 화재 = 1, 반응성 = 1

concepts.name: Chemical Substances Control Act reporting
concepts.evidence: 화학물질관리법에 의한 규제 ... 배출량 조사 대상 화학물질: 해당됨

concepts.name: Waste Control Act designated waste
concepts.evidence: 폐기물관리법에 의한 규제 지정폐기물(폐합성 고분자 화합물)

concepts.name: Dangerous goods transport classification
concepts.evidence: This material is not classified as dangerous under IATA regulations. This material is not classified as dangerous under IMDG regulations. This material is not classified as dangerous under ADR regulations.

evidence.claim: The document is an MSDS with document number TAKPP MSDS-018 and version 1.0.
evidence.evidenceText: 물질안전보건자료 (MATERIAL SAFETY DATA SHEET) Document No. TAKPP MSDS-018 Version 1.0

evidence.claim: The initial preparation date and final revision date are both 2021년 10월 1일, with revision count 1.
evidence.evidenceText: 최초 작성일자 2021년 10월 1일 ... 개정횟수 및 최종 개정일자 1회, 2021년 10월 1일

evidence.claim: The product is carbon fiber prepreg, F07 (F07F) resin system.
The recommended use is industrial and electronic flame-retardant composite material.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품의 권고 용도 산업용, 전자용 난연성 복합재료

evidence.claim: The supplier is Toray Advanced Materials Korea Inc.
The MSDS classifies the product as skin irritation category 2, eye irritation category 2, skin sensitization category 1, and chronic aquatic hazard category 2.
evidence.evidenceText: 피부 부식성/피부 자극성: 구분 2 심한 눈 손상성/눈 자극성: 구분 2 피부과민성: 구분 1 만성 수생환경 유해성: 구분 2

evidence.claim: Hazard statements include H315, H317, H319, and H410.
evidence.evidenceText: H315 피부에 자극을 일으킴 H317 알레르기성 피부 반응을 일으킬 수 있음 H319 눈에 심한 자극을 일으킴 H410 장기적인 영향에 의해 수생생물에게 유독함

evidence.claim: NFPA ratings are health 2, fire 1, and reactivity 1.
The composition includes carbon fiber CAS 7440-44-0 at 50-80 wt%.
The composition includes 2,2-bis(4’-glycidyloxyphenyl) propane CAS 1675-54-3 at 5-15 wt%.
Some chemical identities or concentration ranges are treated as trade secrets.
evidence.evidenceText: 화학명이 구체적으로 명시되지 않거나 함유량이 범위로 표현된 것은 해당 내용이 영업비밀에 포함되기 때문임.

evidence.claim: The material is not assigned a UN number, proper shipping name, or transport hazard class.
evidence.evidenceText: 유엔번호 (UN No.) 해당 없음 ... 적정 선적명 해당 없음 ... 운송에서의 위험성 등급 해당 없음

evidence.claim: The material is not classified as dangerous under IATA, IMDG, or ADR regulations.
evidence.evidenceText: This material is not classified as dangerous under IATA regulations. This material is not classified as dangerous under IMDG regulations. This material is not classified as dangerous under ADR regulations.

evidence.claim: Under the Chemical Substances Control Act, toxic substances, accident preparedness substances, restricted substances, permitted substances, and prohibited substances are not applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: 화학물질관리법에 의한 규제 유독물질, 사고대비물질, 제한물질, 허가물질, 금지물질: 해당 없음

evidence.claim: The product is subject to chemical release reporting for 2,2-bis(4’-glycidyloxyphenyl) propane when contained at 1% or more.
evidence.evidenceText: 배출량 조사 대상 화학물질: 해당됨(1% 이상 함유한 2,2-bis(4’-glycidyl oxyphenyl) propane, 1675-54-3)

evidence.claim: The product is regulated as designated waste under the Waste Control Act as waste synthetic polymer compound.
evidence.evidenceText: 폐기물관리법에 의한 규제 지정폐기물(폐합성 고분자 화합물)

evidence.claim: The MSDS states it was prepared based on Industrial Safety and Health Act Article 41 and Ministry of Employment and Labor Notice No. 2016-19.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 MSDS는 산업안전보건법 제 41조 및 고용노동부 고시 제 2016-19호 (물질안전보건자료의 비치 등에 관한 기준)에 근거하여 국내 관련 규제 법규 현황 등을 고려하여 작성함.

reviewFlags.reason: Document is a supplier MSDS, not an approval certificate or authority-issued regulatory decision.

ProductSignal CYAN and path references to GT1717C/GT1717CP are metadata/path signals only; the source text itself identifies the product as F07 (F07F) resin system and does not state GT1717C or GT1717CP as product models.
No explicit page numbers are present in the preprocessed source text.
